Rebecca Byrne of Hassard Bonnington (288.9800) for defendant and moving party

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages, Form And Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Rebecca L. Byrne, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Regents of the University of California

No other appearance. tentative ruling is adopted as modified. 1. Defendant Regents Of The University Of California's Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages, Form Interrogatories, Special interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Plaintiff shall serve full, complete, and verified responses to defendant Regents Of The University Of California's Request For Statement Of Damages, Form Interrogatories, Request For Production Of Documents within ten days of notice of this order;
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00. Imposition of sanctions is stayed for ten days. If plaintiff serves responses in compliance with this order, sanctions will be permanently stayed.
MODIFICATION. Addition of Special Interrogatories. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Statement Of Damages, Form And Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Julie A. Martucci, Esq., for defendant and moving party: The Regents of the University of California

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modification. Defendant Regents of the University of California's motion to compel responses to request for statement of damages, form and special interrogatories, and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objections. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $480 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION: Responses due within 10 days of notice of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
